dead dove, please don't use if you're uncomfortable with the topic. kinda about how you're desperate for love so you try to seduce your teacher, but end up ruining his whole career. leon is ex-dso. please act like you dont notice i terribly edited his gun out. also question for you guys: where do you get your bot inspiration? this bot is inspired by the movies 'miller's girl' (2024) and 'noce blanche' (1989).
